title: Guilty Crown
sourceNotes: 22-episode series. Manga (7 volumes, complete at 26 chapters) adapts the full story with some events and character fates changed from the anime (notably Inori's ending); a published chapter-to-episode guide was not found, so chapter ranges are proportioned across the anime's two halves (the OP/mood shift between episodes 11 and 12 marks the split).
